program_polls.question: Would you consider investing in NovaYield 7D this week?
How confident are you that CryptoMax 300% will keep paying reliably for the next 30 days?
Will you reinvest your profits from StableBit 1.8% Daily or just withdraw?
How would you rate the current risk level of DailyChain 3.2% Daily?
At 4% daily, is FlashMiner 4.0% worth the risk for a new deposit?
Do you plan to keep your funds in PrimeStake 2.1% Daily for at least another month?
What is your main strategy with UltraHash 5% Daily?
Do you consider ZenProfit 1.5% Daily a relatively safer HYIP compared to others on the list?
How often are you withdrawing profits from RapidUSDT 2% Daily?
How long do you expect MegaHash 7% Hourly to keep paying?
Is GuardianBond 1.2% Daily part of your long-term HYIP diversification strategy?
Does the lower 0.9% daily return of MicroBit 0.9% make you feel more comfortable with the risk?

program_comments.body: First payout received to my BTC wallet in under 3 hours. The 300% after 30 days plan looks insane though, so I'm keeping my deposit small for now.
Got two payouts so far, no issues. But with 300% after 30 days this screams classic high‑risk HYIP. Don't put in anything you can't afford to lose.
Withdrawal processed in about 20 minutes today. Support also answered my ticket quickly. Still, I doubt this can sustain 10% daily for long.
In for day 6, 3.2% daily hitting my USDT wallet like clockwork. I auto‑withdraw instead of compounding because the risk feels high.
Nice returns but the admin changed the FAQ yesterday and removed some wording about reserve funds. Just a heads‑up to everyone following this thread.
Tested with $30 in BTC, got 4% daily for a week now. Payouts are manual but usually within a few hours. Extremely high risk at this rate.
Watching only, not in. 4% daily is the kind of ROI where they usually run for a short burst and then disappear.
Joined on launch day with a small USDT deposit. Completed one 7‑day cycle and got principal back plus interest. So far looks like a short‑term flipper.
UltraHash is paying instantly to my BTC address, 5% daily credited without delays. I already pulled out my seed capital and now only play with profit.
Just joined today with a small deposit. Will report back on withdrawal times in a few days.
Lower ROI but has been paying me for over two months without a single missed withdrawal. Good option if you prefer slow and steady rather than moonshot returns.
All my withdrawals to TRC20 USDT came within 10–15 minutes. Interface is a bit clunky but payments are consistent.
Feels more like a bond‑style HYIP. Returns are small but I've had no payout issues and the admin posts regular updates.
Nice 3.5% daily with BTC only. Been running over a month and all my withdrawals cleared in under an hour so far.
Marked as SCAM. My last two withdrawal requests are pending for 48+ hours with no reply from support.
Stopped paying halfway through the 15‑day cycle. Do NOT invest here, it's already not paying.
Using SafeEarn as the low‑risk part of my HYIP basket. Payouts are slower (sometimes up to 12 hours) but always arrive.
Been compounding on StableBit for over a month. 1.8% daily is decent and so far they haven't missed a payment.

community_profiles.bio: Chasing yield across crypto HYIPs since 2020. I usually start with small test deposits.
Focusing on risk management and early warning signs in HYIP space.
Mostly Bitcoin deposits, small positions across multiple programs.
High risk, high reward. I rotate between new altcoin HYIPs.
I post warnings when I see red flags. Protect your capital first.
Hunting for early entries into promising HYIPs before the crowd arrives.
Trying to minimize losses while still playing the HYIP game.
Primarily USDT deposits, tracking stablecoin-based programs.
I only stick with programs that pay fast and consistently.
New to HYIPs and still learning. I mostly ask questions.
Prefer low ROI programs that can last longer than the hype plays.
My strategy is USDT-only HYIPs and quick withdrawal cycles.
Looking for bond-like HYIPs with lower but steadier returns.
Goal: grow my BTC stack through carefully selected HYIPs.
I flag scams and post detailed reports when payouts stop.
Got burned too many times, now I share my negative experiences openly.
Treating HYIPs as a tiny, experimental slice of a larger portfolio.
Obsessed with compounding schedules and ROI spreadsheets.
Site administrator. I post official announcements and moderate disputes.
Moderator focusing on scam reports and problematic programs.

forum_posts.body: Welcome to the HYIP forum. Please remember that all programs listed here are high risk. Do your own research, never invest money you cannot afford to lose, and clearly state whether a program is paying, waiting, or not paying in your reports.

Moderation note: when reporting a SCAM or NOT PAYING program, please include the program name, a link to the listing, your last successful payout date, and screenshots if possible. This helps us mark programs correctly in the Problematic Programs section.

New HYIP: NovaYield 7D

Start Date: 27 February 2026
Minimum Deposit: $10 USDT
Payment Methods: Bitcoin, USDT, Ethereum
Plan: 2.4% daily for 7 days (principal returned), higher rate Pro plan from $100.

This thread is for NovaYield 7D discussion and payment reports. Remember this is a high-risk HYIP, not an investment recommendation.

Joined the basic 7-day plan with $25 USDT a few hours after launch. First daily accrual posted on time and the dashboard looks clean. I plan to pull out principal after the first cycle and only roll profits if it keeps paying.

Thanks for the report. 2.4% daily is on the aggressive side for a 7-day cycle, so I will stay with a pure test deposit if I join at all. Please keep posting payout confirmations so others can see when/if it stops paying.

New HYIP: CryptoMax 300%

Start Date: 25 January 2026
Minimum Deposit: $25
Payment Methods: Bitcoin, USDT, Litecoin
Plan: 300% after 30 days (principal included), no early principal release.

Use this topic to share payment proofs, reviews, and risk discussion for CryptoMax 300%. This is a very high ROI offer, so treat it as high risk.

Put in a small BTC deposit on day 2 just to test withdrawals. So far support is responsive and the dashboard shows accruals correctly. Still, 300% after 30 days is clearly unsustainable long term, so I'm not treating this as anything but a gamble.

I agree this should be treated as a short-term play at best. Please post exact payout times when you withdraw, including TXIDs if possible. Any delays or batch processing changes are usually early warning signs on programs with such high ROI.

SCAM ALERT: QuickFlip 8% Daily\n\nWe have received multiple reports that QuickFlip 8% Daily has stopped processing withdrawals. The program is now marked as SCAM / NOT PAYING in the Problematic Programs section. Do not send any new deposits. Post your detailed experiences here.

Confirming. Two of my BTC withdrawals have been stuck in "pending" for more than 48 hours. No reply from support email or Telegram. I consider my deposit lost and strongly advise everyone to blacklist this one.

STATUS UPDATE: TurboDouble 15-Day 200%\n\nThe program has moved to NOT PAYING status after we verified multiple failed withdrawal attempts. Listing has been moved into the Problematic Programs view. If you were paid recently, please include your last successful withdrawal date in your post.
I had one early withdrawal paid on day 3, but everything after that is stuck. My last successful payout was 24 February 2026. I lost the rest of my deposit, so consider this one dead.

How do you all diversify between low and high ROI HYIPs? I currently split between programs like ZenProfit / SafeEarn on the low side and a few short-lived high-ROI plays like FlashMiner for fun. Curious how others balance risk vs. potential upside.

Personally I keep 80% of my HYIP allocation in lower ROI programs (under 2% daily) that have already been paying for at least 60 days. The remaining 20% is for experiments like CryptoMax or UltraHash. Once I get my seed back, I reduce exposure to the high-risk ones.

My approach is to rotate quickly through new launches with small test deposits, especially in the first 1020 days of a program. I avoid adding more capital after day 30 regardless of how "stable" it looks, because most high-ROI HYIPs fail unexpectedly around that time.
